qmlDir.description: Optional QML bundle directory to compare against generated output

qmlProject.description: Optional .qmlproject file whose reachable component graph should be compared against generated output

path.description: Legacy destination path override maintained for backward compatibility

recursive.description: Recursively process subdirectories when qmlDir is used

feature.description: Feature folder under the target project's app root

updateBarrel.description: Require the current barrel file conventions to be present

routeMode.description: Require the given route configuration to contain generated routes
